DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT NOE DIAZ'SF MOTION FOR STAY OF DISCOVERY AS TO DEFENDANT NOE BENJAMIN DIAZ PENDING OUTCOME OF CRIMINAL ACTION. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO STAY DISCOVERY AS TO DEFENDANT NOE BENJAMIN DIAZ IS GRANTED. DISCOVERY IS STAYED AS TO DEFENDANT NOE BENJAMIN DIAZ UNTIL THE CRIMINAL ACTION CURRENTLY PENDING AGAINST HIM HAS CONCLUDED. DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SFJUDGEPROTEM@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: CONOR MOORE, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion For Stay Of Discovery As To Defendant Noe Benjamin Diaz Pending Outcome Of Criminal Action
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NOE DIAZ'sf Motion For Stay Of Discovery As To Defendant Noe Benjamin Diaz Pending Outcome Of Criminal Action.

Defendant's unopposed motion to stay discovery as to Defendant Noe Benjamin Diaz is Granted. Discovery is stayed as to Defendant Noe Benjamin Diaz until the criminal action currently pending against him has concluded.

Defendant is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling directly to the Judge Pro Tem at sfjudgeprotem@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Conor Moore, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
